# kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithm

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a number indicating the cryptographic hash function.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithm: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] indicating the kind of cryptographic hash function used within the signature to seal its pieces together. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCSDigestAlgorithm] for possible value.
title: kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithm
